briefs.title: BC Business Corporations Regulation amended to recognise Indigenous nations as corporate owners
briefs.summary: B.C. Reg. 3/2026 amends the Business Corporations Regulation to define 'Indigenous nation' as a recognised intermediary and establishes rules for when a corporation is considered wholly owned by one or more Indigenous nations.
briefs.action_required: Review your corporate ownership and transparency filings if any shares are held by or on behalf of an Indigenous nation.
